display_text: Point Booster, Cost: 1200: Provides a flat increase to both Health and Mana pools, boosting overall survivability and spellcasting capacity. It is a foundational component for many late-game items that require substantial health and mana reserves. No active abilities. Stats: Health: +175, Mana: +175.
